instruction: Continue DeepStake3D REAL GAME FOUNDATION: ModularConstructionPrototype V1. Previous task: modular-construction-v1-continue-1779973115970. First review current git status/diff and the latest builder result. Do not continue generic visual loops. Do not touch WorldPrototype3D unless only reading it for context. If the current result already satisfies V1, make no extra changes and report commit-worthy files. If V1 is incomplete, make the smallest concrete foundation fix needed for one of: isolated scene, real-world scale, modular pieces, grid snapping, 90-degree rotation, place/remove, or tile/chunk data. Immediate stop conditions: WorldPrototype3D decoration, Korean countryside sample-image copying, Screenshot/Discord/UPM work, Meshy prop placement as main task, pretty-only work without place/rotate/remove, no tile/chunk data, or PID kill/Stop-Process attempts. Do not expand into inventory, crafting, combat, NPC systems, save/load repository, multiplayer, or approval tooling. Output must include changed files, commit recommendation, and explicit status for ModularConstructionPrototype.unity, scale, floor/wall/door/window/fence/gate, grid snapping, 90-degree rotation, place/remove, and tile/chunk data.
constraints: REAL GAME FOUNDATION: ModularConstructionPrototype V1 only
Review target is not visual polish and not sample-image matching
Do not use Screenshot, Discord, UPM, approval tooling, or PID/Stop-Process work
Do not make Meshy props placement the main task
Do not expand into inventory, crafting, combat, NPC, or full-house systems
Required: isolated ModularConstructionPrototype scene or equivalent
Required: 1 Unity unit = 1 meter real-world scale
Required: floor, wall, door, window, fence, and gate modular pieces
Required: tile/chunk data structure for future large world
Report changed files and commit recommendation

codex.stdout:
Reviewed current status/diff and latest builder result `modular-construction-v1-continue-1779973115970`. V1 already satisfies the requested foundation scope, so I made no changes.

Changed files by me: none.

Commit recommendation: commit the modular construction V1 scope only, and exclude unrelated dirty `WorldPrototype3D`, screenshot/tooling, animation, material, data, and visual-review files.

Commit-worthy files:
- `unity/DeepStake3D/Assets/Scenes/ModularConstructionPrototype.unity`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/Assets/Scenes/ModularConstructionPrototype.unity.meta`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/Assets/Scripts/Construction.meta`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/Assets/Scripts/Construction/`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/Assets/Tests/PlayMode/DeepStakeLocalPlayModeTests.cs`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/ProjectSettings/EditorBuildSettings.asset`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/docs/product/MODULAR_CONSTRUCTION_PROTOTYPE_V1.md`

Status:
- `ModularConstructionPrototype.unity`: present, isolated scene, registered in build settings.
- Scale: present, `1 Unity unit = 1 meter`, with 1.75m character reference and real-size wall/door/fence values.
- Floor/wall/door/window/fence/gate: present. Also includes corner wall and door frame.
- Grid snapping: present via world tile, chunk, and local tile conversion.
- 90-degree rotation: present via `R` input and `NormalizeRotation`.
- Place/remove: present via left-click place, right-click/Delete remove, plus callable test hooks.
- Tile/chunk data: present via `ModularConstructionChunk`, `ModularConstructionTile`, and `PlacedBuildPiece`.

I did not run Unity tests; the latest builder result notes prior PlayMode attempts were blocked by Unity Package Manager IPC startup, not by the construction code.
